title: fraxinus pennsylvanica subsp. cubensis
intro: Fraxinus pennsylvanica subsp. cubensis, also known as the Cuban green ash or Florida green ash, is a subspecies of the Fraxinus pennsylvanica tree, native to Cuba and the southeastern United States. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Fraxinus pennsylvanica subsp. cubensis include its potential to reduce blood pressure, cholesterol levels, and inflammation, as well as its antimicrobial and antiviral properties. Herbal preparations of the plant include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to promote overall health and well-being.
